content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(7, 9, 0), (2, 7, 1), (1, 5, 2), (4, 6, 4), (0, 8, 5), (0, 5, 8), (1, 8, 10), (3, 6, 10), (1, 2, 13), (3, 4, 14), (5, 8, 15), (6, 7, 15), (0, 7, 16), (1, 4, 17), (4, 5, 17), (0, 4, 19), (4, 7, 19), (6, 9, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 8.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (7, 9, 0) has node 7 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 7, 1) has node 7 and time 1. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 5, 2) has node 5 and time 2. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (4, 6, 4) has node 6 and time 4. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 8, 5) has node 8 and time 5. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (0, 5, 8) has node 5 and time 8. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 8, 10) has node 8 and time 10. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (3, 6, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 2, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (3, 4, 14) has node 4 and time 14. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (5, 8, 15) has node 8 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 15) has node 7 and time 15. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 7, 16) has node 7 and time 16. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (1, 4, 17) has node 4 and time 17. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (4, 5, 17) has node 5 and time 17. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (4, 7, 19) has node 7 and time 19. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (6, 9, 19) has node 9 and time 19. -> Add node 6.

The nodes matched are 2, 5, and 6.

Answer: [5, 6]
